channel.title: Docs on shenzaoyi`blog
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on shenzaoyi`blog

item.description: ![[Pasted image 20240612184118.png]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement|Linux Syscall Implement]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#What is syscall|What is syscall]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#to find syscall|to find syscall]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#Vsyscall & Vdso|Vsyscall & Vdso]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#Syscall and Interupt|Syscall and Interupt]] [[#Linux Syscall Implement#Reference|Reference]] Linux Syscall Implement # What is syscall # syscall behavior syscall and int 0x80 (1)将当前函数执行地址(rip寄存器的值)保存到rcx中； (2)将当前标志寄存器rflag的值保存到r11寄存器中； (3)通过修改rip跳转到MSR_LSTAR寄存器指向的内核函数入口； (4)根据MSR_SYSCALL_MASK寄存器修改rflag寄存器。 How to observe this? What is the syscall entry syscall_init syscall invoke chain #define __LIBRARY__ #include <unistd.
Site Config # site blog ubuntu, windows, pad and phone album http://39.107.61.65:2342 picture-bed

resemble 类似 they resemble library APIs demonstrate v. 证明 be devoted to 致力于 this chapter will be devoted to the System call concept in the Linux kernel. invokes 调用 the syscall instruction invokes a handler of a given system call. appropriate 合适的 all of these functions call an appropriate system call. ubiquitous 无处不在的 system calls are ubiquitous
